ocr_findings.description: Ampersand characters (e.g., 'M&A') rendered as HTML entity '&' in OCR output — cosmetic issue, meaning is unaffected.

reviewer_notes: This is an answer/explanation page (解答・解説) for questions 3-1 through 3-7. It contains answer letters (ア/イ/ウ/エ) with explanations, not multiple-choice question stems. No exam question bodies or 4-choice ア/イ/ウ/エ question format is present; the label should be 'content' (answer-key/explanation material). Existing label 'exam' is incorrect.
